id.description: Stable kebab/snake-case identifier. Used as filename and de-dup key.

question.description: NL question sent verbatim to fresh Genie Code and MCP sessions.

source.description: Case origin: ddr | tableau:<workbook_luid_or_prefix> | genie_benchmark:<space_id> | known_failure

asof.description: Pinned snapshot date. Ground-truth SQL is run with this date; never re-run live.

ground_truth_sql.description: Standalone SQL that produces the expected value when run against UC at asof. Should reference UC FQNs (catalog.schema.table).

value.description: For numeric: a number. For numeric_series: list of [key,number]. For tabular: list of rows. For textual: string. PENDING means unpinned.

tolerance_pct.description: Acceptable relative error (percent of expected) for numeric and numeric_series. Default 0.5%.

tolerance_abs.description: Optional absolute tolerance, used when expected near zero.

expected_skill_hub.description: Top-level skill hub the system SHOULD load (e.g. domain-revenue-and-fees). Use _none_ if no hub applies.

skill_coverage_status.description: Auto-tagged by seed_cases. covered = a hub clearly owns this question, partial = touched but not anchored, missing = no skill mentions the canonical_tables.

canonical_tables.description: UC FQNs the agent SHOULD reference.

anti_sources.description: FQNs or table-name fragments the agent must NOT use as primary source for this question.

expected_filters.description: Required predicates (e.g. 'IncludedInTotalRevenue = 1') that must appear in the agent's SQL.

notes.description: Free-text context, especially for known_failure cases.

max_replicas.description: How many independent fresh-context replicas to run per system per day. Default 3 to detect flakiness.
